base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of maze_layout_primary — a tile (level_layout) from 1980 pac man. Full arcade-cabinet maze — 28×31 tile grid (224×248 px at 8-px tiles). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Full arcade-cabinet maze — 28×31 tile grid (224×248 px at 8-px tiles); 4 corner-power-pellets, ~240 regular dots, ghost-pen at center with spawn gate, side-warp-tunnels mid-screen; blue wall outlines with black background
